raw.official description: Hitting an enemy with Binding Chain increases your damage dealt to them by 30% for 2 seconds.
raw.ability details:
*Damage per second: 111.42 while firing (97.5 w/ reload)
* The damage amplification applies so long as the enemy is hit by Binding Chain, even if they are [[Unstoppable]] and do not get tethered.

raw.ability details: * Stacks additively with his base movement speed boost during Katashiro Return, for a total of +55% movement speed on Mizuki.

abilities.name: Remedy Aura
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.official description: Heal nearby allies. Healing scales with resource generated by dealing damage and healing.
raw.ability details: * The aura boundary is visible only to Mizuki. Allies cannot see it. * When at high aura, a deep rhythmic beat can be heard when healing. * It takes 9 non-critical hits from Spirit Glaive to reach 100% aura (with 8 reaching 96% aura). * The on-screen UI displays the healing multiplier for the aura's base healing (from 1.0x to 4.0x). ** When at 4.0x (100% aura), it will display "MAX". * Mizuki's max aura healing is equal to [[Lúcio]]'s basic [[File:Ability-Lucio2.png|sub|link=Lúcio#Crossfade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lúcio#Crossfade|Crossfade]] healing.

raw.official description: Healing Kasa bounces one additional time. Each bounce increases its healing by 10.
Remedy Aura resource generation increased by 25%.
raw.ability details:
*25% hero damage dealt
*5% deployable damage dealt
*18.75% healing kasa healing
*50% binding chain damage dealt
*12.5% kekkai sanctuary healing

abilities.name: Katashiro Return

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Leap forward, leaving behind a paper doll. Reactivate to return and gain increased movement speed while active.
raw.cast time:
0 + 0.19s (initial)
0 + 0.34 seconds (reactivation)
raw.ability details: * The cooldown begins when Katashiro Return is deployed. * Causes a short leap in the direction the player is travelling upon activation, followed by a lingering movement speed buff while active. ** Leaps forward if the player is not moving. ** Pressing jump at the end of the leap allows player to conserve momentum and travel farther. * The paper doll left behind is considered a strong projectile and cannot be destroyed, absorbed or reflected. ** It deals no damage or healing to opponents or allies, instead acting more like a deployable. ** The doll will not be moved by platforms, and instead remains mid-air where the ability was activated. * Briefly invulnerable ([[phased]]) after reactivation. * Being [[hacked]] or [[stunned]] temporarily disables the reactivation, rather than completely interrupting the ability. * Activating the return will not trigger the [[File:Sub-Role Support Survivor Circle.svg|sub|link=Sub-Roles#Sub-Role: Survivor|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sub-Roles#Sub-Role: Survivor|Sub-Role: Survivor]] passive, only the initial ability activation will. * Initial cast can be activated simultaneously while using other abilities, but the reactivation cannot.

raw.official description: Launch a tethering chain that hinders the first enemy hit.
raw.ability details: * The ability tethers up to 2.5 meters. * Cooldown is triggered even if no target is hit. * Any mid-air heroes hit will be plunged to the ground to the tether. ** If they are over a lethal cliff, they can fall to their death, depending on their height above the ground. * Blocked, but not reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]].

abilities.name: Spirit Glaive

raw.official description: Throw a spinning blade that impacts enemies and rapidly dealing damage.
raw.damage:
30 (base)
30 (total damage over time)
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 85.71 (75 w/ reload) * Spirit Glaive bounces off the environment. It continues bouncing until: ** It collides with an enemy hitbox or [[barrier]]. ** The projectile has travelled distance equal to its maximum range. * Damage over time is unaffected by [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] and does not deal critical damage, but can be affected by other damage amplifications.

abilities.name: Healing Kasa
shot_type: [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
[[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted
raw.official description: Throw your hat to heal an ally, bouncing to nearby allies and healing you when it returns.
raw.range distance:
30 meters (initial throw)
12 meters (bounce range from target)
raw.ability details:
* Bounces up to 3 times, automatically targeting the lowest health ally within range after the first target.
* Cannot bounce back to an ally it has already hit.
* The hat cannot be targeted through terrain, but once the hat has locked on to an ally, it can follow them through walls.
* If no ally is within line of sight of the kasa upon hit, it will automatically return to Mizuki.
* Mizuki will always receive 30 healing from Healing Kasa, regardless of the order it hits him.
* The cooldown starts once the Healing Kasa is thrown, not once it returns to Mizuki.
* If the target ally is eliminated before the hat can reach them, it will instead travel towards the next nearest ally (if in range).
** If no ally is in range, it will return to Mizuki, and provide no self healing.

abilities.name: Kekkai Sanctuary
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.official description: Create a sanctuary that heals allies within and absorbs enemy projectiles that pass through it.
raw.heal:
100 (instant)
40 per second
raw.ability details: * The damage absorption works similarly to [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], meaning that melee and beam weapons, area effects and strong projectiles pierce through it. * The startup is instant, but the area is created after a 0.048 second delay. **If Mizuki dies within that delay, the ultimate will be canceled.
